mapper.sql: select id, site_id, box_id, is_visible, is_featured, custom_name, custom_description, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_site_box_relations
mapper.select: select r.id, r.site_id, r.box_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_featured, r.custom_name, r.custom_description, r.sort_order, r.view_count, b.name as box_name, b.slug as box_slug, b.cover_image as box_cover_image, b.type as box_type from gb_site_box_relations r inner join gb_game_boxes b on r.box_id = b.id where r.site_id = #{siteId} order by r.sort_order, r.id

select r.id, r.site_id, r.box_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_featured, r.custom_name, r.custom_description, r.sort_order, r.view_count, w.name as site_name from gb_site_box_relations r inner join gb_sites w on r.site_id = w.id where r.box_id = #{boxId} order by r.sort_order, r.id
select count(*) from gb_site_box_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId}
select count(*) from gb_site_box_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId} and relation_type = #{relationType}
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_site_box_relations ( site_id, box_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_featured, custom_name, custom_description, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{siteId}, #{boxId},
#{relationType} 'include' , #{isVisible}, #{isFeatured}, #{customName}, #{customDescription}, #{sortOrder}, #{viewCount}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into gb_site_box_relations(site_id, box_id, is_visible, is_featured, sort_order, view_count, relation_type, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.siteId}, #{item.boxId}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.isFeatured}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: update gb_site_box_relations set is_visible = #{isVisible}, update_time = NOW() where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId}

update gb_site_box_relations
is_visible = #{relation.isVisible}, is_featured = #{relation.isFeatured}, custom_name = #{relation.customName}, custom_description = #{relation.customDescription}, sort_order = #{relation.sortOrder}, update_time = NOW(),
where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId} and relation_type = 'include'
update gb_site_box_relations set view_count = view_count + 1 where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId}
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_site_box_relations where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from gb_site_box_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.delete: delete from gb_site_box_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and box_id = #{boxId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
